### Feature description

Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

### Use case

Why is this important? How will it help developers using TryAppStack Audit?

### Proposed solution

If you have a concrete idea (new audit module, CLI command, AI agent enhancement), describe it here.

### Alternatives considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches?

### Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.
